title: happyfied's Reimagined Crafting
description: HFD's RC - Over 400 recipes and 20 new items, all aimed to make survival progression more immersive and challenging via crafting, smelting and smithing.
body:
![Datapack Logo / Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98a2aa204640f7e2db40a7bf9962c4d794493240.png)

## About the Datapack
**happyfied's Reimagined Crafting** is a datapack that's designed to make Minecraft Survival progression more engaging and challenging by changing recipes from the Crafting Table, Furnace and Smithing Table, to elevate the importance of exploration and provide a more enriched and interesting experience. 

## Showcase

![Image described below](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0baff1caff23400ef645b5e5b5d5e2b4a241113a.gif)

_Comparison of the Enchanting Table recipe tree with and without pack_

_Brown - Crafting, Gray - Smelting, Dark Brown - Smithing, Blue - Mining, Dotted - Optional / Multiple recipes_

## Features
**happyfied's Reimagined Crafting** brings a plethora of new things to the game such as:
- 23 new items:
> - **Cane Sugar**, crafted from Sugarcane
> - **Papyrus**, also crafted from Sugarcane
> - **Cloth**, crafted from Wool
> - **Dough**, crafted from Wheat and Water
> - **Sticks** for all Wood types
> - **Branches**, dropped and crafted from Leaves
> - **Fiber String**, crafted from Wheat Seeds
> - **Unlit Campfires**, crafted from Sticks and Logs
> - **Blue Crystal Dye**, crafted from Lapis Lazuli
> - **Cyan Crystal Dye**, crafted from Prismarine Crystals
> - **Equipment Stands**, crafted from an Armor Stand and Sticks
> - **Pickled Warts**, a new food crafted from Nether Warts and Mushrooms
> - **Copper Nuggets**, smelted from Raw Copper (pre 1.21.9)

- Over **330 overhauled recipes**,
<details>
<summary>Full changed recipes list</summary>

- Sugar Cane to Sugar (now gives less)
- Honey to Sugar
- Paper from Sugar Cane (now gives less)
- Nuggets from Iron and Gold ingots (now gives less)
- Ingots from Nuggets (now uses less)
- Crafting Table
- Leather Armor
- Horse Leather Armor
- Beds
- Bread
- Cookie
- Cake
- Furnace
- All Stairs (now use and give less)
- Anvil
- Planks from Logs (now give less)
- Enchanting Table
- Beacon
- Chest
- Ender Chest
- Ender Eye
- Wooden Tools
- Stone Tools
- Shears
- Bucket
- Stonecutter
- Lead (now gives less)
- All Boats
- Recovery Compass (now uses less)
- Compass (now uses less)
- Clock (now uses less)
- Piston
- Diamond Equipment
- Dried Kelp (takes less time)
- TNT
- Disc 5 (now uses less)
- Shield
- Wolf Armor
- All Buttons (now give more)
- Snow Layers (now uses less and gives more)
- Bow
- Chain (now uses less)
- Book (now uses more)
- Raw Iron and Gold smelting
- Cauldron
- Brewing Stand
- Door (now gives more)
- Lever
- Sea Lantern
- Cartography Table
- Fletching Table
- Smithing Table
- Golden Carrot
- Glistering Melon
- Lantern
- Soul Lantern
- Brush
- Lightning Rod
- Spyglass
- Copper Grate
- Repeater
- Comparator
- All Pressure Plates (now give less)
- Barrel
- All Rail recipes
- Dye from Pitcher Plant
- Pumpkin Pie

- All Carpets (now give more)
- Allium to dye (now gives Purple Dye)
- White Tulip to dye (now gives White Dye)
- Bamboo Planks
- Flint And Steel
- All Trapdoors (now give more)
- Copper/Iron Door (now give 2)
- Glass Bottle
- Dropper
- Dispener
- Observer
- End Crystal
</details>

- Over **40 new ones**,
<details>
<summary>Full added recipes list</summary>

- All mentioned before for custom items
- Campfire from Unlit Campfire
- Calcite from Coal and Bonemeal
- Paper from Wood and Water
- Chainmail from Chain
- Bottle o' Enchanting from Heart of the Sea, Lapis Lazuli and Bottle (Smithing)
- Red Dye from Pickled Wart
- Enchanted Golden Apple duplication from itself and Gold Blocks
- Bone Meal from Nautilus Shell
- Brick from Pottery Sherd
- Red Dye from Crimson Roots
- Cyan Dye from Warped Roots
- Magenta Dye from Spore Blossom
- Brown Dye from Armadillo Scute
- Green Dye from Turtle Scute
- Brown Dye from Pitcher Pod
- Gray Dye from Glow Lichen
- Purple Dye from Chorus Fruit
- Dead Bush from Saplings
- Tall Grass and Fern from small variants and Bone Meal
- Bamboo from Bamboo Block
- Rabbit Hide from Rabbit Foot
</details>

- And more!

## Important Notes
**happyfied's Reimagined Crafting** is a datapack that's designed to be played standalone from other packs that impact the crafting system, as it might become incompatible if other packs change the same recipes. While **happyfied's Reimagined Crafting** is made to be compatible with other packs, be aware of the possibility that it might just not work together.

This pack also modifies the base models for the Stucture Block, Jigsaw, and Repeating Command Block, so remember that when pairing it with other packs that also change or use those.

## Additional Info
Heavily recommended to play with [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei).

To disable the "Loaded succesfully!" message, add the [Disable HFD Load Popups](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-hfd-popups) datapack to your datapack/mod folder.

Using this pack in a video or modpack is fine as long as proper credit is given.

If you wish to contact me you can do so via Gmail (happyfiedyt@gmail.com), Discord (@happyfied), or the [happyfied Modrinth Feedback Form](https://forms.gle/WRtN3YQVyJuZWpuN7).

Bugs wanted.
